scenarios.name: Central Pinellas Tornado Warning
scenarios.description: Demo scenario: NWS tornado warning across central Pinellas County, FL. Gulf entry near Seminole, projected NE through Largo and Pinellas Park, exiting into Tampa Bay near Gandy.
scenarios.path_description: NE across central Pinellas peninsula, Gulf-entry near Seminole, exiting into Tampa Bay near Gandy Boulevard.
scenarios.narrative_notes: Numbers are not baked — every figure Claude reports is pulled live from CDC SVI / FEMA NRI / ALICE / Florida parcel data for the actual intersecting Pinellas tracts.
